title: euphorbia × pseudovillosa
intro: Euphorbia × pseudovillosa, also known as Pencil Tree or Stick-Onion, is a succulent plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues. Euphorbia × pseudovillosa has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce pain and fever, and alleviate digestive problems, offering numerous health benefits. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
